layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips crypto — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100, and it's getting worse. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing away from smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. Most altcoins on the watchlist have bearish chart structures with prices below their key moving averages. While there are a few interesting setups, none offer a clean enough entry with strong enough conviction to justify risking capital in this environment.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep cash ready. Wait for fear to stabilize or reverse before entering new trades. If ETH drops to $1,800 support with a clear bounce signal, that could be the next opportunity.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate was evaluated and none passed the quality filter. BONK is deeply oversold (RSI 31) but has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — classic falling knife. TRUMP has RSI 22 (strongly oversold, our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the chart is bearish (-0.70), the coin is -97.8% from ATH, and the R/R is only 1.0x — not compelling enough. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +51.7% five-day momentum means it's already extended. ETH is the best candidate to watch: RSI approaching oversold at 39, $1,800 is a clear support level, and it has the strongest fundamental backing. However, the bearish chart structure (-0.70 bias), price below all major MAs, worsening Fear & Greed trend, and high BTC dominance all argue for waiting. In extreme fear with worsening sentiment, catching the exact bottom is dangerous — better to wait for confirmation.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear trending worse (25 and declining) could cascade into further sell-offs across all alts
BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising means alt rotation trades are actively punished
No MACD cross or volume breakout confirmation on any candidate — all setups are speculative
watch_list: ETH holding $1,800 support — a bounce there with volume confirmation is the next clean entry
Fear & Greed index — watch for stabilization above 30 as a signal that selling pressure is exhausting
BTC reaction to $65,000 resistance — a breakout could ignite the relief rally that helps alts
market_context: Crypto is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with worsening sentiment. BTC dominance at 56.5% is squeezing altcoins. The market needs a catalyst — potentially the Fed meeting or BTC breaking $65K — before alts become attractive swing trades.
context_banner: Extreme Fear and rising BTC dominance create a hostile environment for alt swing trades — capital preservation takes priority.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 and trending worse — historically signals either a bottom or more pain ahead. Without stabilization, risk is elevated for new entries.
TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but poor chart structure and low R/R ratio make it a trap rather than a trade.
Massive BTC call spreads targeting $72K by month-end suggest institutional positioning for upside, but this hasn't translated to price action yet.
ETH derivatives reset noted — could set up a cleaner long entry once the reset completes and new positioning emerges.
LDO is the only candidate with a bullish chart (+0.85 with Three White Soldiers), but +51.7% five-day momentum makes chasing it too risky at current levels.
